meta.mission: CRM Dashboard & Contacts Table Template Research
meta.target_stack: React + Shadcn/UI + Supabase + Tailwind CSS + TanStack Table
meta.recommendation_reason: Only open-source CRM that matches ALL 5 stack requirements (React, Shadcn, Supabase, Tailwind, contacts+pipeline+dashboard). Fork and adapt.

templates.name: Atomic CRM
templates.screenshot_desc: Full CRM with sidebar navigation, contacts list with search/filter, deals kanban pipeline, activity timeline, dashboard with metrics cards. Clean Shadcn aesthetic with light/dark mode.

tech_stack.auth: Google, Azure, Keycloak, Auth0 via Supabase

pros: EXACT stack match: React + Shadcn + Supabase + Tailwind
Full CRM out of the box (contacts, deals, tasks, notes, companies)
Sample dataset (500 contacts) for immediate testing
Shadcn Registry integration (shadcn add to update components)
Built by Marmelab (creators of react-admin) — production-grade quality
MIT license, self-hostable, static SPA frontend
cons: Uses react-admin internally (opinionated data layer)
905 stars (smaller community vs generic dashboards)
TanStack Table not used directly (react-admin has its own data grid)
May need refactoring to extract CRM components without react-admin
Contacts filter uses ra-data-postgrest convention (may differ from direct Supabase queries)

effort_to_adapt.notes: Fork → adapt Supabase schema to GATO3 contacts (cidade, segmento, potencial) → customize dashboard cards → rebrand. If react-admin is too opinionated, extract Shadcn components and Supabase schema separately.

templates.name: NextCRM
templates.screenshot_desc: Enterprise CRM with sidebar, accounts/contacts/leads/opportunities modules, dashboard with Tremor charts, unified search, AI enrichment features.

tech_stack.ai: OpenAI embeddings + Claude Sonnet 4.6 + E2B sandbox

pros: Full CRM with 5 modules (accounts, contacts, leads, opportunities, contracts)
AI enrichment (contact research via E2B sandbox)
Vector search with pgvector for semantic similarity
MCP Server (25 tools across 5 CRM modules)
cons: NO Supabase — uses PostgreSQL + Prisma (would need migration)
Heavier stack (Inngest, E2B, Resend, pgvector)
568 stars (smaller community)
More complex setup than needed for simple CRM
Overkill AI features for GATO3 use case

effort_to_adapt.notes: Would need to replace Prisma with Supabase client, migrate schema, strip unnecessary AI features. Better to use as reference for TanStack Table patterns + Tremor dashboard layouts than as a direct fork.

templates.name: Shadcn Admin
templates.screenshot_desc: Clean admin dashboard with collapsible sidebar, data tables with search/sort, charts area, settings pages. Light/dark mode, RTL support. No CRM-specific views but excellent component library.
pros: Excellent component quality and RTL support
Clean, minimal aesthetic matches GATO3 brand
cons: NOT a CRM — generic admin dashboard
No Supabase integration
No contacts management
No pipeline/kanban
Would need to build CRM features from scratch
Uses TanStack Router (not React Router or Next.js)

effort_to_adapt.notes: Best used as LAYOUT reference — steal sidebar, theme system, and page structure. Build CRM features on top using Atomic CRM patterns + tablecn for data tables.

templates.name: Next Shadcn Dashboard Starter
templates.screenshot_desc: Dashboard with analytics overview, Recharts graphs, metric cards, data tables with server-side search/filter/pagination via TanStack Table. Sidebar with multi-tenant workspace selector.

tech_stack.state: TanStack React Query + Zustand + nuqs (URL state)

pros: URL state via nuqs (shareable filtered views)
Excellent reference for dashboard + data table patterns
cons: NOT a CRM — generic dashboard starter
No Supabase integration
No contacts management
Clerk auth (would need to replace with Supabase Auth)
More starter than template — needs building on top

effort_to_adapt.notes: Excellent base for dashboard layout + TanStack Table patterns. Add Supabase integration, build contacts table on the existing data table infrastructure, add CRM-specific pages.

templates.name: tablecn (sadmann7)
templates.screenshot_desc: Advanced data table with Notion/Airtable-like filtering, Linear-style command palette filter menu, dynamic toolbar with search/faceted filters, row selection with action bar. Server-side sorting/filtering/pagination.
pros: 6k stars — most popular shadcn data table
Notion/Airtable-like advanced filtering (EXACTLY what CRM needs)
Linear-style command palette for filter menu
Row selection with batch action bar
Drop-in component for any shadcn project
cons: TABLE ONLY — no dashboard, no CRM, no layout
Uses PlanetScale + Drizzle (not Supabase directly)
Would need to swap data layer to Supabase
Focused component, not full template

effort_to_adapt.notes: BEST contacts table component. Extract table component, swap PlanetScale for Supabase, define columns for contacts (nome, cidade, segmento, potencial, telefone, whatsapp). Combine with Atomic CRM for full app or shadcn-admin for layout.

templates.name: OpenStatus Data Table Filters
templates.screenshot_desc: Minimalist data table with schema-based filters, URL state persistence via nuqs, infinite scroll option, faceted filtering. Clean shadcn aesthetic with muted colors and monospace typography.
pros: Schema-based approach (define columns once, get filters auto-generated)
BYOS (Bring Your Own Store) — works with nuqs, zustand, or custom
Already uses Drizzle + Supabase PostgreSQL in examples
Claude Code AI agent skill included
Playbook approach: copy patterns, not install library
cons: TABLE ONLY — no dashboard or CRM layout
1.9k stars (newer project)
Schema patterns are opinionated (logLevel, httpStatus presets)
Would need to define CRM-specific filter presets
More complex setup than tablecn for simple use cases

effort_to_adapt.notes: Schema-based approach is excellent for CRM: define contacts schema with cidade/segmento/potencial columns, get filters auto-generated. Already has Supabase example. Best combined with a dashboard template.

templates.name: Tremor Dashboard OSS
templates.screenshot_desc: Clean SaaS dashboard with KPI metric cards, line/bar/area charts, data visualization panels. Professional design with dark/light mode. No data tables.
pros: Built on Radix UI (compatible with shadcn ecosystem)
Beautiful KPI cards, sparklines, area charts
cons: NOT shadcn — uses Tremor Raw (different component system)
CHARTS ONLY — no tables, no CRM features
No Supabase integration
Would need to integrate into shadcn project separately
504 stars (smaller community)

effort_to_adapt.notes: USE FOR CHARTS ONLY. Copy Tremor chart components into shadcn project for dashboard metrics (total contatos, por cidade, pipeline). Tremor charts work alongside shadcn components since both use Tailwind + Radix.

templates.name: Refine CRM
templates.screenshot_desc: Enterprise CRM with dashboard charts, sales kanban board, contacts/companies CRUD, calendar, audit logs. Multiple UI framework options (Ant Design, MUI, Mantine).

tech_stack.ui: Ant Design / MUI / Mantine / Chakra / Custom Tailwind

pros: Full CRM template with 10+ CRUD interfaces
Headless approach — can work with any UI
Scaffolding via refine.new (15 seconds to CRUD app)
cons: NO native Shadcn support (Ant Design/MUI focused)
Heavy framework — opinionated routing, data, auth
CRM template uses GraphQL + Ant Design (not Supabase + Shadcn)
Steep learning curve for Refine's abstractions
Overkill for simple contacts CRM
Would need custom UI integration for Shadcn

effort_to_adapt.notes: Great Supabase connector but wrong UI layer. Would need to build shadcn integration from scratch. Better to use as REFERENCE for CRM data patterns and Supabase queries than as base template.

templates.name: TailAdmin React
templates.screenshot_desc: Admin dashboard with 35+ components, charts (ApexCharts), data tables with sorting/filtering, sidebar navigation, calendar, chat interface. CRM dashboard available in pro version.
cons: NOT Shadcn (custom components)
CRM features are PRO only
No Supabase integration
No TanStack Table
Would need heavy rework to match target stack

effort_to_adapt.notes: Wrong stack entirely. Only useful as visual reference for dashboard layout. Do not use as base.

templates.name: Shadcn/UI Official Data Table
templates.screenshot_desc: Official shadcn data table documentation showing TanStack Table integration with column filtering, sorting, pagination. Minimal but correct implementation pattern.
pros: Column filtering, sorting, pagination, row selection
Minimal code — easy to understand and extend
Best starting point for custom data table
cons: Very basic — no advanced filtering, no faceted search
Client-side only (no server-side patterns)
Just documentation, not a template
No CRM features
Needs significant building on top

effort_to_adapt.notes: Start here if building from scratch. Use as foundation, add tablecn patterns for advanced filtering, add Supabase data layer. Good learning path but slower than forking Atomic CRM.

strategy_recommendation.approach: HYBRID — Fork Atomic CRM + Enhance with tablecn
steps: 2. Adapt Supabase schema: add cidade, segmento, potencial, telefone, whatsapp columns to contacts table
3. Replace contacts list with tablecn component (Notion-like filters for cidade/segmento/potencial)
4. Add Tremor chart components to dashboard (total contatos, por cidade, pipeline status)
5. Customize detail panel for GATO3 contact fields

alternative_approach.name: Build from scratch with next-shadcn-dashboard-starter
alternative_approach.when: If react-admin dependency in Atomic CRM is too opinionated
